title: Tanger CEO: Lululemon, Coach ‘Anchors' at Our Outlets
description: Stephen Yalof, President and CEO of Tanger, discusses what differentiates the online experience from in-store retail, saying customer service is the key advantage. He tells Romaine Bostick and Bailey Lipschultz on “The Close” that brands want to be where their customers are. (Source: Bloomberg)
